description: Create the complete MiFIP product page at public/pages/mifip.html with question-based persuasive content, premium banding table, error-free calculator, and proper styling using the shared design system
steps: Create public/pages/mifip.html following the structure pattern from public/pages/mccp.html (DOCTYPE, meta tags, link to /assets/style.css, site-header placeholder, main content, site-footer placeholder, inline scripts, main.js script)

Add page-specific inline <style> block with MiFIP-themed custom CSS variables and component styles (hero gradient, benefit cards, calculator styling, timeline, FAQ accordion) - similar to how mccp.html defines its own styles. Use jade green gradient theming.

Build Hero section with product name 'MiFuture Income Protector (MiFIP)', tagline, and key stats (800% total benefit, IDR & USD, 20 years income). Use question-based hook like 'Bagaimana jika Anda bisa menerima penghasilan tetap selama 20 tahun tanpa bekerja?'

Build product overview section using QUESTION-BASED persuasive language throughout (e.g., 'Pernahkah Anda membayangkan memiliki gaji yang terus mengalir meski sudah pensiun?'). Highlight key terms using .kw (jade - for product features/benefits), .kw-cta (tangerine - for action-oriented keywords/amounts), .kw-gold (gold - for premium/financial terms). Include complete product specs table (currency, min Dana Mapan, Usia Mapan options, payment modes, underwriting SIO).

Build Benefits section showing the 800% breakdown: 100% Manfaat Usia Mapan, 400% Manfaat Tunai Tahunan (20% x 20 years), 200% Manfaat Akhir Pertanggungan, 100% perlindungan jiwa. Use benefit cards with percentage highlights. Include total manfaat summary.

Build Premium Banding table section showing all 4 bands with IDR and USD ranges and characteristics (Band 1: Rp50jt-99.9jt / $5k-$9,999 Standard; Band 2: Rp100jt-199.9jt / $10k-$19,999 Start discount; Band 3: Rp200jt-499.9jt / $20k-$49,999 Medium discount; Band 4: >=Rp500jt / >=$50k Maximum discount). Include estimated premium ratios (70%, 66%, 62%, 59.6%).

Build the interactive calculator section with these inputs: Currency (IDR/USD), Dana Mapan amount, Payment mode (Single/Regular 5 years). Implement EXACT band determination logic: IDR bands at 50M/100M/200M/500M thresholds, USD bands at 5k/10k/20k/50k thresholds. Error validation for minimum amounts (Rp50.000.000 / USD 5.000). Real-time output showing: band category, benefit breakdown (100% + 400% + 200%), total benefit amount, estimated premium based on band ratios. Format numbers with thousand separators (dots for IDR, commas for USD). The calculator must be ERROR-FREE - test all edge cases.

Build FAQ section with accordion-style Q&A covering: what is MiFIP, what is Dana Mapan, total benefits, payment options, minimum amounts, age requirements, death benefit, premium waiver, currency options, registration process.
Build CTA section with WhatsApp link to wa.me/6287781896087 with pre-filled message about MiFIP inquiry. Include floating WA button.

Ensure dark mode compatibility by adding html.dark overrides for custom styles where needed. Test that .kw, .kw-cta, .kw-gold classes work in both modes (they already have dark mode styles in style.css).
acceptance_criteria: Page links to ../assets/style.css (relative path for file access) or /assets/style.css (for served access)

Page includes
and
placeholders
Keywords are highlighted with .kw (green), .kw-cta (orange), .kw-gold (gold) classes - colors do not clash
Content uses persuasive question-based language in Indonesian
Premium banding table shows all 4 bands with IDR/USD ranges
Calculator correctly determines band based on Dana Mapan input and currency
Calculator shows error for amounts below minimum (Rp50.000.000 / USD 5.000)
Calculator displays benefit breakdown: 100% Usia Mapan, 20% x 20 = 400% Tunai Tahunan, 200% Akhir, total up to 800%
Calculator formats numbers with proper thousand separators
Calculator has no JavaScript errors - all functions work correctly
WhatsApp CTA links work with correct phone number and pre-filled message
verification: Run: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const html=fs.readFileSync('/projects/sandbox/Project-Cuan-3.0/public/pages/mifip.html','utf8'); console.log('File exists:', html.length > 0); console.log('Has style.css link:', html.includes('style.css')); console.log('Has site-header:', html.includes('site-header')); console.log('Has site-footer:', html.includes('site-footer')); console.log('Has main.js:', html.includes('main.js')); console.log('Has .kw class:', html.includes('class=\"kw\"') || html.includes(\"class='kw'\")); console.log('Has calculator:', html.includes('function') && html.includes('Dana Mapan')); console.log('Has WA link:', html.includes('wa.me'));"
Validate the JavaScript in the page has no syntax errors by extracting and running it through Node.js eval or a basic syntax check
findings: Page created successfully at public/pages/mifip.html (41KB). All verification checks pass: correct HTML structure, style.css linked, site-header/footer placeholders, main.js included, .kw/.kw-cta/.kw-gold classes used for keyword highlighting, calculator JS is syntax-error-free, band determination logic verified for all boundary values, number formatting correct (dots for IDR, commas for USD), FAQ accordion functional, WhatsApp CTA links correct. NODE_OPTIONS must be cleared when running node commands in this environment.
